spec_match.rationale: Two identical scrollboxes; only the right has position-try-options: most-scroll-position. Same syntax-naming concern as sibling.

interactive.rationale: User must scroll both boxes manually to see the flicker — no replay button.

edge_cases.rationale: Only covers middle-breakpoint case; not scroll-top/scroll-bottom edges.

openQuestions.title: Add a synchronised scroll-replay button
openQuestions.detail: Program a scripted scroll through both boxes in lockstep so the flicker delta is visible without manual interaction.

openQuestions.title: Verify position-try-options syntax
openQuestions.detail: Same concern as sibling — confirm syntax matches current spec.

openQuestions.title: Add a third panel for scroll-restoration
openQuestions.detail: On reload at deep scroll, remembered offset should be the new position, not the page-load default. Show this boundary.

summary: Strongest of the four visually — truly side-by-side. Add scripted scroll replay so the delta isn't behind manual interaction.
